text:
Evaluating a RAG Chat App
Using the compare tool
What are the two codebases that power Coursera's user-facing experience and what are their functions?
baseline
r_vectors_no_ranker
Coursera has two codebases that power its user-facing experience. The older codebase is based on PHP/MySQL and a custom routing/templating/CM framework. It is the codebase behind class.coursera.org, where students take classes. It was originally built for the machine learning class, which was the first version of Coursera. The newer codebase is behind www.coursera.org.
The two codebases that power Coursera's user-facing experience are the older codebase and the newer codebase. The functions of these codebases are not specified in the sources provided.
